case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS VIRAY NORMA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VIRAY NORMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,742.90 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT VIRAY NORMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIRAY NORMA $1,742.90 PRINCIPAL, $54.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,797.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
